title: 30 Springhurst Avenue
headline: 12-Storey High-Rise Apartment Building Steps from Toronto's Waterfront
description: 30 Springhurst Avenue presents the opportunity to acquire a well-located 12-storey high-rise apartment building in one of Toronto's most desirable west end rental nodes.
fullDescription: Situated on a 0.98-acre site just steps from the lakefront, BMO Field, Exhibition Place, and an array of neighbourhood amenities, the property combines strong in-place cash flow with compelling value-add potential through rental growth, ancillary revenue enhancement, and further optimization of underutilized interior space. The building contains 122 suites and offers an attractive suite mix of 22 bachelor units, 77 one-bedroom units, and 23 two-bedroom units.
features: Strong rental upside with approximately 34.5% potential rent increase
Significant value-creation potential through conversion of large storage areas
Meaningful recent capital improvements including garage, boiler, electrical, and sprinkler
Diversified ancillary income from parking, lockers, coin laundry, telecom, and hydro
Suites separately metered for hydro with water submetering underway
Prime Toronto west-end location near the waterfront, BMO Field, and Exhibition Place

title: Oak House (700 Spadina Avenue)
headline: 50% Leasehold Interest in Premier U of T Student Residence
description: Colliers, on behalf of the University of Toronto, is pleased to present a unique opportunity to acquire a 50% leasehold interest in Oak House, a newly constructed, purpose-built student residence located at 700 Spadina Avenue in the heart of downtown Toronto.
fullDescription: Oak House is a state-of-the-art student residence serving the University of Toronto's downtown St. George campus. This newly constructed asset represents a rare opportunity to invest alongside one of Canada's most prestigious academic institutions in a purpose-built student housing asset with institutional-grade income characteristics.
features: 50% leasehold interest alongside the University of Toronto
Newly constructed, purpose-built student residence
Prime downtown Toronto location on Spadina Avenue
Strong institutional-grade income profile
Proximity to U of T's St. George campus

title: Chestnut Residence (89 Chestnut Street)
headline: 50% Leasehold Interest in Iconic U of T Student Residence
description: Colliers, on behalf of the University of Toronto, is pleased to present a unique opportunity to acquire a 50% leasehold interest in Chestnut Residence, home to over 1,100 students from all University of Toronto faculties and colleges.
fullDescription: Chestnut Residence is one of the University of Toronto's flagship downtown residences, offering spacious rooms, high-quality meal plans, and a vibrant residence life program. Located steps from the Eaton Centre and Toronto's entertainment district, the property benefits from exceptional locational attributes and consistent demand from U of T's student population.
features: 50% leasehold interest alongside the University of Toronto
Home to 1,100+ students across all U of T faculties
Prime downtown Toronto location near Eaton Centre
Consistent institutional demand with built-in occupancy
Full-service residence with meal plan and amenities

title: 231 Vaughan Road
headline: 52-Unit Apartment Building in Midtown Toronto
description: 231 Vaughan Road is a 52-unit multifamily investment opportunity located in the established Oakwood-Vaughan neighbourhood of Toronto. Part of a portfolio offering alongside 149 Cosburn Avenue and 116 Spencer Avenue.
fullDescription: This well-maintained apartment building offers investors the opportunity to acquire scale in a desirable midtown Toronto location with strong transit connectivity and neighbourhood amenities. The property is being offered as part of a 122-unit portfolio or individually.
features: 52 residential suites in midtown Toronto
Established Oakwood-Vaughan neighbourhood
Available individually or as part of 122-unit portfolio
Strong rental demand in supply-constrained submarket

fullDescription: This apartment building is well-positioned in one of Toronto's most sought-after east-end neighbourhoods, offering strong fundamentals and rental growth potential. The property is being offered as part of a 122-unit portfolio or individually.

title: 165 Colborne Avenue
address: 165 Colborne Avenue, Richmond Hill, Ontario L4C 2K2
headline: 40-Suite Multifamily Asset in Richmond Hill's Harding Neighbourhood
description: 165 Colborne Avenue is a 40-suite multifamily investment opportunity nestled in the heart of Richmond Hill's charming Harding neighbourhood, one of York Region's most desirable submarkets.
fullDescription: This property offers investors exposure to one of the GTA's strongest suburban rental markets, with excellent transit connectivity and proximity to major employment centres. Richmond Hill continues to benefit from population growth and limited new rental supply.
features: Established Richmond Hill location
Strong York Region rental market fundamentals
Excellent transit connectivity
Supply-constrained submarket

title: 1083 Main Street East
address: 1083 Main Street East, Hamilton, Ontario L8M 1N5
headline: 63 Recently Renovated Modern Multifamily Suites in the Heart of Hamilton
description: 1083 Main Street East presents an exceptional investment opportunity featuring 63 recently renovated modern suites in Hamilton, Ontario. The three-storey building offers a balanced mix of 9 bachelor, 25 one-bedroom, 25 two-bedroom, 3 three-bedroom, and 1 four-bedroom units.
fullDescription: Located at 1083 Main Street East in Hamilton, Ontario, this property offers an exceptional investment opportunity with recently completed high-end renovations and a prime location. The three-storey building features 63 modern multifamily suites: 9 bachelor, 25 one-bedroom, 25 two-bedroom, 3 three-bedroom, and 1 four-bedroom unit, attracting a diverse tenant base. With projected Year 1 NOI of $840,982 and additional revenue from laundry and parking, the property is positioned for strong income generation. Tenants are responsible for both water and electricity, reducing operating costs. Nearly fully vacant, the building offers investors the flexibility to implement a lease-up program targeting top-of-market rents. Each suite features luxury tiled tub surrounds, stone countertops, stainless steel appliances, energy-efficient windows, individual heating and cooling, and modern pot lighting throughout. Originally built in 1922 and fully renovated in 2023/2024, the building includes 16 underground and 12 courtyard parking spaces. Zoned TOC1 (Transit-Oriented Corridor, medium-density mixed-use).
features: Projected Year 1 NOI of $840,982 generating immediate income
63 recently renovated suites with luxury finishes throughout
Nearly fully vacant with flexibility to lease at top-of-market rents
Tenants responsible for water and electricity, reducing operating costs
On-site parking (16 underground + 12 courtyard) and laundry for ancillary revenue
Zoned TOC1 (Transit-Oriented Corridor) with medium-density mixed-use potential
Built 1922, fully renovated 2023/2024 with modern systems throughout
Brochure available in English and French

title: 56 South Forster Park Drive
address: 56 South Forster Park Drive, Oakville, ON L6K 1Y7
headline: 15-Unit Low-Rise Apartment Building in the Heart of Oakville
description: Colliers is pleased to offer for sale a 100% freehold interest in 56 South Forster Park Drive, a freestanding 15-unit low-rise apartment building located within a 5-minute drive from downtown Oakville. All units are two-bedroom suites. The property benefits from stabilized income, owned laundry facilities, and additional parking revenue.
fullDescription:
The property has a projected Year 1 Net Operating Income of $170,877 and is ideal for investors seeking significant upside potential in one of the GTA's most desirable submarkets. Significant upside potential exists through rent adjustments on tenant turnover, making this an excellent option in a supply-constrained market.

Beyond the strong underlying fundamentals, the property is well-kept and provides a welcoming atmosphere to tenants. Suites have been renovated upon vacation, and common areas feature mid-century design details, creating a warm environment that residents are proud to call home.

Six of 15 units have been fully renovated since 2016. Capital improvements include a new boiler system (2015), new roof system (2015), parking lot repaved (2017), watermain replacement (2018), new entry doors and intercom system (2019), common area refurbishment (2019), laundry room renovation (2023), and water-efficient toilets (2024).
features: All 15 units are two-bedroom suites in a desirable Oakville location
5-minute drive to downtown Oakville with excellent transit access
All hydro separately metered and paid directly by tenants
Owned laundry machines provide additional income
Projected Year 1 NOI of $170,877 with further income growth potential
6 of 15 units fully renovated since 2016
Significant capital improvements completed (roof, boiler, entry, watermain)

title: 49 St. Mary's River Drive
address: 49 St. Mary's River Drive, Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario P6A 6G9
headline: 102-Unit Investment Opportunity in Sault Ste. Marie
description: Station 49 Apartments is a 102-suite, purpose-built multifamily asset located at 49 St. Mary's River Drive in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario. This investment presents a compelling opportunity to acquire scale in a stable Northern Ontario rental market with significant embedded upside.
fullDescription:
The property features a highly efficient unit mix, with 101 one-bedroom suites and 1 two-bedroom suite. It is professionally managed with steady turnover that supports rental growth. The asset generates additional revenue through laundry, parking, and air conditioning rentals, and has implemented cost-saving systems such as individual heating cost controls.

With approximately 60% upside to market rents, robust historical turnover averaging 16.9% annually over the last three years, and recent capital improvements, Station 49 Apartments is well-positioned to deliver strong cash flow and long-term value growth for an active investor.
features: Significant rental upside (approx 60%)
Favourable turnover trends (average 16.9% over the last 3 years)
Attractive pricing on a per-unit basis
Supplementary revenue streams through laundry and parking income
Recent capital improvements - brand new hot water tanks, exterior renovation and more
In-suite energy controls installed to improve energy efficiency

title: 17-19 Collier Street
address: 17-19 Collier Street, St. Catharines, Ontario L2P 2T1
headline: Beautifully Renovated 32-Unit Multifamily in St. Catharines
description: Presenting 17-19 Collier Street, a beautifully renovated 32-unit multifamily property in the heart of St. Catharines, Ontario. This 1.09-acre, four-storey building combines modern amenities with an ideal location, making it an excellent investment opportunity.
fullDescription:
Built in 1951 and fully updated in 2022-2023, the property offers a balanced suite mix of 15 one-bedroom and 17 two-bedroom units, each designed with contemporary comforts and quality finishes.

Each unit features an open-concept living space with a modern kitchen equipped with quartz-style countertops, a stylish tile backsplash, and a spacious island ideal for dining. Brand-new flooring runs throughout, and bathrooms have been updated to include full-sized baths with tiled surrounds. Tenants enjoy personalized comfort with individual heat controls and energy-efficient windows, while on-site laundry facilities add convenience and generate supplemental income.
features: Strong projected Year 1 NOI of $481,606
Renovated units featuring open-concept layouts, quartz-style kitchen countertops and new flooring
Hydro individually metered, with costs fully covered by tenants; electric heating
On-site laundry generates supplemental income
6 rentable storage lockers available for extra income
